# agent

Bento's own in-product AI assistant you converse with to investigate your data, not the monitored agent runs themselves (those are traces/trajectories). Dashboard: Agent.

**When to use:** When the user wants to ask Bento's built-in assistant a question or manage that chat, not query issues/traces directly.

## Commands

| Command | Invocation | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| `confirm-action-route` | `bentolabs agent confirm-action-route --data '<json>'` | approve or reject an action the agent proposed |
| `create-conversation` | `bentolabs agent create-conversation --data '<json>'` | open an empty thread, no message yet |
| `enqueue-chat` | `bentolabs agent enqueue-chat --data '<json>'` | send a message (auto-starts a thread if none); returns the turn_id to read |
| `get-conversation` | `bentolabs agent get-conversation <conversation_id>` | one thread plus its full message history |
| `get-turn` | `bentolabs agent get-turn <turn_id>` | read a turn and its events once, as a snapshot |
| `list-conversations` | `bentolabs agent list-conversations [--limit --offset]` | paged index of chat threads |
| `stream-turn` | `bentolabs agent stream-turn <turn_id> [--after-seq]` | live event stream of a turn, resumable via --after-seq |

Confirm exact arguments with `bentolabs agent <command> --help`.
